message:
fix(gemini): simplify path end detection in connector

Removes redundant newline check from path extraction logic. The
existing whitespace check (c.is_whitespace()) already covers newlines,
making the explicit '\n' check unnecessary.

This simplification reduces code duplication without changing behavior
since char::is_whitespace() returns true for '\n', '\r', '\t', and
space characters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
